Ma Earth $500k matching pool opening next week (eligibility: nonprofit/fiscal sponsor; sweet spot <$20k grants, >$20k lending). Project aggregation strategy: per-individual balance to prevent multi-project gaming. Jane Ukraine = partners not chapter. Region Commons finally opening to community. Luiz personal overload + Coi Green Goods tensions — Durgadas coordination suite recommended.
